body:
Craft – Quality of Life Crafting Recipes Mod
For Minecraft

Tired of rare or uncraftable items slowing down your progress? EasyCraft adds a collection of simple and balanced crafting recipes to help streamline your survival experience — without breaking the game!

🛠️ Features:
Name Tag – Craftable with Paper, String, and an Iron Ingot.

Enchanted Golden Apple – Now craftable using 8 Gold Blocks and a Golden Apple.

Wither Skeleton Skull – Get 2 Skulls from Coal, Bone, and a Skull.

Saddle – Made from 5 Leather and an Iron Ingot.

Upgrade Template – Craft 2 with 3 Diamonds, Netherrack, and an existing Template.

Gunpowder – Combine Flint and Charcoal to create it.

Leather from Rotten Flesh – Smelt Rotten Flesh in a Furnace to get Leather.

All recipes are configurable and balanced to fit seamlessly into your gameplay.

🔧 Compatibility:
Works with NeoForge on Minecraft 1.21.4.

Lightweight and fully server-compatible.

Perfect for players who want a smoother experience without relying on cheats or commands. Craft smarter, not harder!

📥 How to Install EasyCraft Mod

Download the Craft mod file (usually a .jar file) from the official source or trusted mod sites.

Open your Minecraft folder:

Windows: Press Win + R, type %appdata%\.minecraft, and hit Enter.

macOS: Go to ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft

Locate or create a folder named mods.

Place the EasyCraft .jar file inside the mods folder.

Run Minecraft using the NeoForge 1.21.4 profile.

Enjoy the new crafting recipes in your game!
